Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain identical character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions as established in previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
